# First Game

## Navigation

[Home](Home) | [Modules](Modules) | [API](API) | [Examples](Examples) | [Reference Games](Reference-Games) | [Lureksome](Lureksome)

## Table of Contents

- [Next Steps](#next-steps)

A minimal game needs state, update logic, and drawing. Callbacks are optional, but this set is a useful starting point.

```lua
local player = { x = 100, y = 220, speed = 180 }

function lurek.init()
    lurek.window.setTitle("First game")
    lurek.render.setBackgroundColor(0.05, 0.07, 0.10)
end

function lurek.process(dt)
    if lurek.input.keyboard.isDown("right") then
        player.x = player.x + player.speed * dt
    end
    if lurek.input.keyboard.isDown("left") then
        player.x = player.x - player.speed * dt
    end
end

function lurek.draw()
    lurek.render.setColor(1, 1, 1, 1)
    lurek.render.rectangle("fill", player.x, player.y, 48, 48)
end
```
